ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Use the 'humanization' feature from moment.js, when rendering the time spans titles.
ast.target: 在渲染时间跨度标题时，使用 moment.js 的“人性化”功能。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Use callouts to render note previews, using their styles based on current theme.
ast.target: 使用标注来渲染笔记预览，并根据当前主题使用其样式。

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Add Time Span
ast.target: 添加时间跨度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define time spans to review, e.g. '1 month' or 'every 6 months'. Overlapping time spans may cause duplicate entries.
ast.target: 定义要回顾的时间跨度，例如“1 个月”或“每 6 个月”。重叠的时间跨度可能会导致重复条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of days to include before and after the date being checked
ast.target: 在检查日期前后包含的天数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Order time spans and notes either by oldest or newest first.
ast.target: 按最旧或最新优先排序时间跨度和笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the date of the currently open daily note.
ast.target: 使用当前打开的每日笔记的日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a random daily note besides the other notes.
ast.target: 在其他笔记旁边显示一个随机的每日笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show the random daily note on top or bottom.
ast.target: 指定随机每日笔记显示在顶部还是底部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Length of the preview text to show for each note.
ast.target: 为每条笔记显示的预览文本长度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Render the note title above the preview text, when showing note previews.
ast.target: 在显示笔记预览时，在预览文本上方渲染笔记标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format note previews using the HTML quote element
ast.target: 使用 HTML 引用元素格式化笔记预览

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the notes in a new pane/tab by default when clicking them.
ast.target: 默认情况下，点击笔记时在新窗格/标签页中打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use notifications (inside Obsidian) to let you know, when there are new journal entries to review. This will happen when Obsidian is focused and it's a new day.
ast.target: 使用通知（在 Obsidian 内部）告知您有新的日志条目需要回顾。这将在 Obsidian 获得焦点且是新的一天时发生。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use any string or regex (without `/` at beginning and end or flags) to filter the note content before rendering.
ast.target: 使用任何字符串或正则表达式（开头和结尾不带 `/` 或标志）在渲染前过滤笔记内容。
